atoms.name: All Checks Green
atoms.description: Deployment gate that blocks forward progress until all required CI checks have passed. Evaluates the GitHub Actions 'needs' context to confirm every upstream job concluded with 'success'. A single upstream failure causes this gate to fail, preventing any deploy step from running. Implements Code.md §11.10: 'Merge before CI green defeats Code.md §3.'

runtime.command: echo 'All upstream checks green — proceeding to deploy.'

atoms.name: CI Validate Stage
atoms.description: Validation stage that runs the atoms catalog validator (validate_atoms.py) against all atom JSON files in the repo. Confirms schema conformance, required field presence, and SemVer format for every atom before any build or deploy step proceeds.

atoms.name: npm ci
atoms.description: Install Node.js dependencies from the lockfile using 'npm ci'. Fails fast if package-lock.json is absent or out of sync with package.json. Produces a reproducible, clean node_modules from the pinned lockfile — never hoists or deduplicates beyond what the lockfile specifies.
